description: Modular AI skill system for Antigravity-style multi-role agent behavior

priority: Combine complementary skills for complex tasks
Escalate to orchestrator for full-system problems

skills.name: orchestrator
skills.description: Handles multi-layer system coordination across frontend, backend, database, and infrastructure.

skills.name: software-architect
skills.description: Designs system architecture, modules, domain models, and scalable structures.

skills.name: ai-agent-engineer
skills.description: Builds and optimizes AI agents, prompt systems, memory, and tool usage.

skills.name: ui-ux-designer
skills.description: Designs modern UI, UX flows, layouts, and usability improvements.

skills.name: frontend-developer
skills.description: Implements UI components, API integration, state management, and frontend performance.

skills.name: backend-architect
skills.description: Designs APIs, business logic, authentication, and backend systems.

skills.name: database-optimizer
skills.description: Optimizes database schema, queries, indexing, and performance.

skills.name: security-engineer
skills.description: Handles authentication, authorization, validation, and system protection.

skills.name: devops-automator
skills.description: Manages deployment, CI/CD, environments, and infrastructure.

skills.name: api-tester
skills.description: Tests APIs, validation, error handling, and integrations.

skills.name: ui-tester
skills.description: Tests UI behavior, responsiveness, and user flows.
